name: pmf-engine-wiring
description: PMF engine wiring bundle — deterministic fetch/clean/funnel/asset bricks + firing hooks + deploy integrations (non-marketing). Builder entry doc: WIRING-BUNDLE.md.
comment: Proven against Node 20.20.0 / Playwright 1.59.1 (P21-H6, 2026-06-26). After install, run `npx playwright install chromium` for the live-DOM fetch/funnel-assemble bricks. Verify the bundle with: bash engine/contracts/h6-all.sh
